b.title: Enterprise & Organizational Structure Management
b.description:
The Aim: To provide a definitive, high-fidelity structural backbone that maps complex corporate identities and internal hierarchies to operational execution.
Core Features & Business Impact
Dynamic Entity Classification: Precision modeling of diverse legal structures, from Standalone Companies to complex Holding Groups, Subsidiaries, and Joint Ventures.
User Appeal: Automatically aligns your digital platform with your legal reality, ensuring accurate compliance, billing, and multi-entity governance.
Node-Based Hierarchy Architect: A flexible, visual tool for building intricate internal organizational charts (Boards, Departments, Units) with embedded team placement.
User Appeal: Mirrors your real-world workflows and reporting lines, eliminating the friction of shadow structures and disconnected teams.
Integrated PPPM & Goal Tiering: Native enforcement of project lifecycles (Portfolio to Activity) and strategic goal hierarchies.
User Appeal: Ensures that every task and project is programmatically linked to a specific organizational unit, creating 100% alignment between structure and strategy.
Ecosystem Connectivity
Upstream Synergy: Consumes core User Profiles (A2.1) and onboarding data to establish the initial corporate footprint.
Downstream Value: Provides the essential Organizational Context required by the Financial Management (O) and Team Management modules for accurate cost-allocation and workload analytics.

b1.title: Legal Entity & Corporate Relationship Management
b1.description:
The Aim: To establish an immutable, verifiable digital identity for every organization on the platform, ensuring that complex corporate structures are translated into seamless operational reality.
Core Features & Business Impact
Universal Entity Classifier: Accurately catalogues every registrant—from Private Limited Companies and Cooperatives to NGOs and Individuals.
User Appeal: Ensures your platform environment is perfectly tailored to your legal status, automating the complexities of regional compliance and industry-specific defaults.
Corporate Relationship Architect: A guided interface for mapping Holding-Subsidiary, Affiliate, and Joint Venture links with precise ownership percentages.
User Appeal: Enables Group-Level power, allowing parent companies to manage resources and view performance across their entire portfolio without manual data consolidation.
Automated Group Derivation: Intelligently identifies Groups of Companies based on equity links to apply collective policies and billing logic.
User Appeal: Unlocks volume discounts and unified governance, ensuring that related entities move as a single, coordinated force.
Ecosystem Connectivity
Upstream Synergy: Receives initial onboarding triggers from the Business Support System (A1) to verify legal standing.
Downstream Value: Hardcodes the Visibility Rules for the Team Management Module, defining exactly how workload and performance data can be aggregated at a group level.

b2.title: Internal Organizational Hierarchy Management
b2.description:
The Aim: To provide a dynamic and flexible blueprint that mirrors your real-world operational structure, ensuring every department, unit, and team is perfectly positioned for peak execution.
Core Features & Business Impact
Multi-Level Hierarchy Architect: Effortlessly build complex, nested organizational charts from top-level Directorates down to specialized functional sections.
User Appeal: Eliminates structural ambiguity by providing a Single Source of Truth for your internal design, ensuring that workflows and approvals always find the right desk.
Interactive Org Chart Visualizer: A high-fidelity, drag-and-drop tool to explore, modify, and communicate your company structure in real-time.
User Appeal: Empowers leadership with Clarity at a Glance, allowing you to see exactly where your human capital and teams are deployed across the enterprise.
Team-Unit Embedding: Seamlessly anchors specialized teams into their correct departmental context.
User Appeal: Transforms your org chart from a static picture into a live operational hub, enabling direct comparison of team performance and workloads by department.
Ecosystem Connectivity
Upstream Synergy: Triggered by the legal entity creation in Module B1; every internal hierarchy is rooted in a validated corporate identity.
Downstream Value: Provides the essential OrgUnitID required by the Financial and Team Management modules to roll up costs and aggregate productivity reports by department.

b3.title: Individual & Team Placement
b3.description: Manages the assignment of individuals to teams, roles, and organizational units. Ensures visibility into workforce distribution, supports access control logic, and forms the foundation for performance, compliance, and capacity planning.

b4-1.title: Team Management
b4-1.description: Centralizes the creation, configuration, and lifecycle management of teams. Supports cross-functional and matrix teams, ownership assignment, and operational readiness across projects and departments.

b4-2.title: Role Alignment
b4-2.description: Aligns functional and operational roles within teams to enterprise standards. Ensures role clarity, reduces duplication, and enables consistent authorization, responsibility mapping, and performance measurement.

b4-3.title: Reporting Structure
b4-3.description: Defines formal reporting lines and escalation paths across teams and organizational units. Supports managerial visibility, governance enforcement, and accurate chain-of-command representation.

b5.title: Project Lifecycle Structure Definition
b5.description: Establishes standardized project lifecycle stages, governance checkpoints, and ownership models. Enables consistent execution, visibility into progress, and alignment with enterprise delivery frameworks.

overview.title: Business Operations Management
overview.description: Orchestrates day-to-day operational processes across the enterprise, ensuring efficiency, consistency, and measurable outcomes. This module serves as the execution backbone connecting strategy, resources, and delivery.

overview.title: Core Platform Services
overview.description: Provides foundational platform capabilities including identity, configuration, integration, and system governance. Ensures scalability, security, and interoperability across all BEAPOne modules.

overview.title: Customer Management
overview.description: Manages customer entities, relationships, and engagement contexts across the enterprise. Supports lifecycle tracking, segmentation, and integration with operational and analytical workflows.
